title: Pokeshout
body:
100% Server sided, no client mod needed.

Commands:
- /Pokeshout <slot>
- /Pokeshout All
- /Pokeshout Reload (OP Only)

Dependencies:
- https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api
- https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonplaceholders
 
If you would like any custom features/ integrations for your server please reach out to me on discord.
